positive: A stylized geometric celestial tapestry featuring interconnected phases of the moon, abstract planetary orbits, and glowing bioluminescent flora, arranged in a symmetrical mandala pattern. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with clean, bold linework, reminiscent of stained glass and Japanese woodblock prints. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep midnight blues, burnt ochre, emerald green, and metallic gold accents. The composition must be centrally focused and highly scalable for fabric printing, ensuring clear silhouettes and strong visual separation between elements. Intricate, detailed, highly polished, vector illustration, digital painting, suitable for apparel print.
